## Before You Submit

**Please search existing issues to avoid duplicates.** Your bug may already be reported.

Please do not include credentials, private transcripts, recordings, personal screenshots, or other sensitive local data in public issues.

## Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Area

<!-- Check any that apply. -->

- [ ] Dictation or text insertion
- [ ] Audio device, recording, or permissions
- [ ] Local transcription, models, or post-processing
- [ ] Meetings, history, tasks, dictionary, or MCP context
- [ ] Account, Pro, sync, sharing, support, telemetry, or other hosted API behavior
- [ ] Installation, update, packaging, or platform integration

## System Information

**App Version:**

<!-- You can find this in the app settings or about section -->

**Operating System:**

<!-- e.g., macOS 14.1, Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04 -->

**CPU:**

<!-- e.g., Apple M2, Intel i7-12700K, AMD Ryzen 7 5800X -->

**GPU:**

<!-- e.g., Apple M2 GPU, NVIDIA RTX 4080, AMD RX 6800 XT, Intel UHD Graphics -->

What happened instead?

## Logs or Screenshots
